name: Playtomic (Public)
description: Find padel, tennis, and futsal courts worldwide — read-only, no account needed. Search clubs near you, check court availability and pricing, browse Playtomic's tenant catalog. 4 tools, zero setup.
instructions:
This connector wraps Playtomic's **public** read endpoints — no login, no API key, no setup. It's the fastest way to give an AI agent the ability to find padel/tennis courts and check availability.

**What you can do without an account**:
- Search clubs (tenants) by geo coordinate + radius, optionally filtered by sport.
- Fetch a single club's full details (resources/courts, opening info, address, timezone, images).
- Read free time slots for a given day across one or more clubs, with prices.
- Read Playtomic's sport configuration (allowed durations, resource types, sport list).

**What requires the full Playtomic connector instead**:
- Your own profile, level, match history, social graph.
- Open matches you can join.
- Member/club-specific discounted pricing (this connector returns generic pricing).
- Booking a court (write operations are not exposed — Playtomic has no official public booking API).

**Pricing notes**:
- `price` is a string like `"48 EUR"` — parse amount + currency separately.
- Same `start_time` may appear multiple times with different `duration` values (60/90/120 min). These are alternative bookings of the same slot, not separate free slots.
- `duration` is in **minutes**.

**Time handling**:
- `local_start_min` / `local_start_max` are naive ISO-8601 in the tenant's local timezone — find the timezone in `tenant.address.timezone` (e.g. `Europe/Berlin`).
- For a full-day window use `2026-05-23T00:00:00` → `2026-05-23T23:59:59`.

**Joining availability back to courts**: every availability row has a `resource_id`; map it back to `tenant.resources[].name` from `get_tenant` to know which court (indoor/outdoor, single/double, etc.).

**Rate limits**: Playtomic has no published public-API SLA. Be gentle — under 1 req/s is safe. The connector identifies itself honestly as AnythingMCP (no UA spoofing).

**Stability**: this is an undocumented/internal API reverse-engineered from the iOS app. Endpoints can change without notice. If a tool breaks, check the docs URL for updates.

**Suggested starter prompts**:
- "Find padel clubs within 30 km of Milan that are open today."
- "What time slots are free on Saturday afternoon at FREIBURG PADEL?"
- "Compare prices across all padel clubs in Madrid for Sunday morning, 90-minute sessions."
- "Which courts in Barcelona offer indoor crystal padel?"

tools.name: playtomic_search_tenants
tools.description: Search Playtomic clubs (tenants) — typically by geo coordinate + radius. Returns active clubs with their courts (`resources[]`), address, timezone, and images. Use this first to find clubs near a city, then pass the `tenant_id` values into `playtomic_get_availability` to check free slots.

coordinate.description: Geo center as `lat,lon` (e.g. `48.0708,7.9006` for Freiburg, `41.3851,2.1734` for Barcelona). Required for geo search.

radius.description: Search radius in meters. Default 50000 (50 km). Max practical ~100000.

sport_id.description: Sport filter. Most clubs are PADEL.

tools.name: playtomic_get_tenant
tools.description: Get full detail of a single Playtomic club by `tenant_id` — including all courts (`resources[]` with indoor/outdoor, single/double, surface), opening info, contact, gallery. Use this after `playtomic_search_tenants` to drill into a specific club, or to enrich availability results (join `availability.resource_id` → `tenant.resources[].name`).

tools.name: playtomic_get_availability
tools.description: Read free court slots for a given day at one or more clubs. Returns an array, one entry per court (`resource_id`), each with `slots[]` of `{ start_time, duration (min), price (string like "48 EUR") }`. The same `start_time` may appear with multiple durations (60/90/120) — those are alternative bookings, not separate slots.

tenant_id.description: One tenant UUID, or several comma-separated (e.g. `id1,id2,id3`). Use IDs returned by `playtomic_search_tenants`.

local_start_min.description: Naive ISO-8601 lower bound in the tenant's local timezone, e.g. `2026-05-23T00:00:00`. For a full day, pair with `local_start_max` = `T23:59:59` on the same date.

local_start_max.description: Naive ISO-8601 upper bound, same-day end e.g. `2026-05-23T23:59:59`.

tools.name: playtomic_get_sport_configuration
tools.description: Read Playtomic's canonical sport configuration — enums for allowed durations, court properties (indoor/outdoor/roofed, single/double, wall/crystal/panoramic), and supported sports. Useful to validate filters before calling other tools.
